task_completion.description: Open and read the tuning specifications document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/dfr_tuning_specs.txt.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the parameter configuration section in the ground control station (e.g., QGroundControl).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl application is open and the 'Parameters' tab under Vehicle Setup is visible.

task_completion.description: Update the horizontal speed and acceleration parameters to the correct converted values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGC parameter list shows WPNAV_SPEED set to 2200 and WPNAV_ACCEL set to 350.

task_completion.description: Update the vertical speed parameters (up and down) to the correct converted values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGC parameter list shows WPNAV_SPEED_UP set to 600 and WPNAV_SPEED_DN set to 400.

task_completion.description: Update the waypoint radius and landing speed parameters to the correct converted values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGC parameter list shows WPNAV_RADIUS set to 800 and LAND_SPEED set to 80.

task_completion.description: Create the final commissioning report documenting the tuning completion and horizontal transit speed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the creation of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/dfr_report.txt, containing text that states tuning is complete and mentions the new horizontal transit speed.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to modify the parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QGroundControl parameter search and edit dialogs, rather than just editing a parameter file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not fly the vehicle, adhering to the negative constraint.
integrity.visual_evidence: The vehicle status in QGroundControl remains 'DISARMED' or there is no evidence of the drone taking off or flying on the map view.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created the report file in the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit or nano) or a terminal command (like echo or cat) is visibly used to write to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/dfr_report.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The tuning specifications are located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/dfr_tuning_specs.txt. The correct converted parameter values to look for in QGroundControl are: WPNAV_SPEED = 2200, WPNAV_SPEED_UP = 600, WPNAV_SPEED_DN = 400, WPNAV_ACCEL = 350, WPNAV_RADIUS = 800, and LAND_SPEED = 80. The final commissioning report must be saved at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/dfr_report.txt.
